summary: Backend regression testing completed after refactoring from 7000+ line monolith to modular structure. All 29 tests passed (100% success rate). Core functionality verified: auth, dashboard, clock in/out, tickets, calendar, leave requests, chat channels.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactored modules (core/, models/, services/) are well-structured with proper exports
core/config.py: Settings class properly loads env vars and defines constants
core/database.py: MongoDB connection properly initialized using settings
core/auth.py: JWT auth functions properly implemented with security middleware
models/__init__.py: All model modules properly exported
services/utils.py: datetime serialization helpers properly implemented
server.py still contains all routes but imports from modular structure work correctly
seed_data_creation: Test tickets and leave requests created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified - all core APIs working. Modules tested: 1) Auth (admin/employee login, /auth/me), 2) Dashboard stats (/admin/dashboard-stats), 3) Clock in/out (/employee/clock-in, /employee/clock-out, /employee/current-shift), 4) Tickets (/tickets GET/POST), 5) Calendar (/calendar/events, /holidays), 6) Leave requests (/leave/requests GET/POST, /admin/leave/requests), 7) Chat (/chat/channels, /chat/channels/{id}/messages), 8) Employees (/admin/employees), 9) Timesheets (/employee/timesheets, /admin/timesheets), 10) Projects (/projects), 11) Notifications (/notifications). Note: Leave endpoint is /leave/requests not /leave-requests.
